name: Toronto Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Milk, scalded (heated until bubbles appear around the edges)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch round layer cake pan and line with wax paper.
2. Combine the scalded milk and butter in a bowl.
3. Sift or blend together flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Beat the eggs until very light and fluffy. Gradually beat in granulated sugar and vanilla. Mix for 1 minute at high speed.
5. Fold in the dry ingredients, then stir in the hot milk mixture.
6. Pour into the prepared pan and bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
7. Allow to cool in the pan. When almost cool, loosen the edges and remove from the pan.
8. Split into two layers, sandwich together with raspberry jam, and sprinkle icing sugar on top.
MAKES: 1 CAKE
